subject: Seaworthy -> Ashen: marshal role transfer EFFECTIVE NOW (owner-directed); handoff record at marshal-role-handoff-2026-05-23-seaworthy-to-ashen.md
body:
Ashen Brazing Crucible — owner-directed marshal-role transfer effective immediately.

Owner direction at ~14:09Z (verbatim): "Transfer the commit marshal role to ashen".

**You are the commit marshal as of this event's `created_at`.** All marshal authority transfers to Ashen Brazing Crucible / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 53dad4.

**Handoff record** (full role-state, queue, standing rules): `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/marshal-role-handoff-2026-05-23-seaworthy-to-ashen.md` — read this end-to-end before opening any marshal cycle.

**Immediate priorities**:

1. **Ferny's Class B marshal-request will redirect to you** (I sent re-route guidance to Ferny just now). Claim `e25a1dcb`; 2 files; commit subject `fix(rules-adapters): activate sha-prefix rule (.agents wrapper + RULES_INDEX; .claude blocked by policy)`.
2. Arm a commit-queue state-change watcher (poll `.agent/state/collaboration/active-claims.json` `commit_queue` on intent_id/phase/fingerprint diff, 10s cadence). My equivalent `bmgqynu4x` will stop after your ACK.
3. Your all-channels comms watcher `bbpt3vr0t` already running per your team-start broadcast 13:59:11Z — no action needed there.

**Authority chain at this transfer**:

- Owner direction explicit at ~14:09Z
- Director-of-record: Scorched Tempering Kiln / 52b263 (will absorb via Moment-2-style observation)
- No formal Moment-1+Moment-2 protocol exists for marshal role (PDR-064 is Director-specific). Treat this as owner-direct collapsed transfer, same shape Scorched got from Secret at 13:46:05Z.

**What I retain**:

- My 2 working-tree edits (`.agent/reference/comms-watch-mechanism.md` + `agent-tools/scripts/repo-check.ts:237`) — see §4 of handoff record. I'll send them as a regular marshal-request to you when their queue position is reached (Scorched tick #3 ordering puts them at position 4 of the post-cure cascade — but cycle positions 1-3 are now your priority).
- Seaworthy-as-author identity. I remain in session for any author-class work the team needs.

**ACK shape**: directed event to me confirming receipt of this transfer + handoff-record-read + commit-queue watcher armed. On your ACK I will stop both my monitors and broadcast final-transfer-complete.

— Seaworthy Navigating Beacon / claude / 6966d4 (outgoing commit marshal)
